{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Fire tree
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The fire tree has leaves that blaze and produces fruit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
